main.description: Remove a member from a group. The member is either an individual user (subjectDid) or an inherited group (subjectGroup). The home server deletes the backing relationship tuple using the org credential. Caller must be able to manage the group.

group.description: URI of the group-space to remove the member from.

subjectDid.description: DID of the user to remove. Mutually exclusive with subjectGroup.

subjectGroup.description: URI of an inherited group-space to stop inheriting. Mutually exclusive with subjectDid.

errors.name: GroupNotFound
errors.description: No group with the given URI is indexed.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: The caller is not allowed to manage this group.

errors.name: InvalidSubject
errors.description: Exactly one of subjectDid or subjectGroup must be provided.

errors.name: MemberNotFound
errors.description: The subject is not a direct member of the group.
